---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---
Rceattle uses age-1 recruitment with Jan-1 b-day

# Hypotheses
Cod: winter (age-0), spring (age-0.25), summer (age-0.5)
Pollock: winter (age-0), spring (age-0.25), summer (age-0.5)
Sablefish: winter (age-0), spring (age-0.25), summer (age-0.5)
Northern rockfish: winter (age-0), spring (age-0.25), summer (age-0.5)
ATF: fall (lag-1 of age 0.75), winter (age-0), spring (age-0.25), summer (age-0.5)

# Season/Month
Winter: DJF (Dec, Jan, Feb)
Spring: MAM
Summer: JJA
Fall: SON

# Performance metrics:
retrospective-forecast skill
AIC
effect size
SD of beta
retro stability of effect size

# TODO (June 17th)
Double check bridging of Sablefish
Derive performance metric tables
